ass%7Bconstructor(e%2Ct%2Cr%2Ci)%7Bthis.name%3De%2Cthis.category%3Dt%2Cthis.options%3Dr%2Cthis.keybind%3Di%2Cthis.waitingForBind%3D!1%2Cthis.isEnabled%3D!1%2Cthis.modes%3D%7B%7D%2Cthis.toggle%3Dthis.toggle.bind(this)%7DregisterMode(e%2Ct)%7Bthis.modes%5Be%5D%3Dt%7DonEnable()%7B%7DonDisable()%7B%7DonRender()%7B%7DbeforeTick()%7B%7DafterTick()%7B%7DonSettingUpdate()%7B%7DonChunkAdded()%7B%7DonChunkRemoved()%7B%7DonGameEntered()%7B%7DonGameExited()%7B%7DonNoaTick()%7B%7DonPacket(e)%7B%7Denable()%7Bthis.isEnabled%3D!0%2Cc.emit(%22module.update%22%2Cthis)%2Cc.emit(%22module.toggle%22%2C%7Bname%3Athis.name%2Cenabled%3A!0%7D)%2Cthis.onEnable()%7Ddisable()%7Bthis.isEnabled%3D!1%2Cc.emit(%22module.update%22%2Cthis)%2Cc.emit(%22module.toggle%22%2C%7Bname%3Athis.name%2Cenabled%3A!1%7D)%2Cthis.onDisable()%7Dtoggle()%7Bthis.isEnabled%3Fthis.disable()%3Athis.enable()%7D%7D%3Bvar%20k%3Dclass%20extends%20s%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22Criticals%22%2C%22Combat%22)%7DCRIT_OFFSETS%3D%5B.08%2C-.07840000152%5D%3BonPacket(e)%7Bif(e.name%3D%3D%22SPacketUseEntity%22%26%26e.data.action%3D%3D%22ATTACK%22)for(let%20t%20of%20this.CRIT_OFFSETS)g.sendPacket(g.createPacket(%22SPacketPlayerPosLook%22%2Cg.fields.SPacketPlayerPosLook%2C%7Bpos%3Anew%20g.Vector3(%7Bx%3An.game.player.pos.x%2Cy%3An.game.player.pos.y%2Bt%2Cz%3An.game.player.pos.z%7D)%2ConGround%3A!1%7D))%7D%7D%3Bvar%20K%3D%7BnormalizeVector(o)%7Blet%20e%3Do.x*o.x%2Bo.y*o.y%2Bo.z*o.z%3Bif(e%3E0)%7Blet%20t%3D1%2FMath.sqrt(e)%3Breturn%5Bo.x*t%2Co.y*t%2Co.z*t%5D%7Dreturn%20o%7D%2CdistanceBetween(o%2Ce)%7Blet%20t%3De.x-o.x%2Cr%3De.y-o.y%2Ci%3De.z-o.z%3Breturn%20t*t%2Br*r%2Bi*i%7D%2CdistanceBetweenSqrt(o%2Ce)%7Breturn%20Math.sqrt(this.distanceBetween(o%2Ce))%7D%7D%3Bvar%20w%3Dclass%20extends%20s%7Bconstructor()%7Bsuper(%22Killaura%22%2C%22Combat%22%2C%7BDelay%3A100%2C%22Auto%20Block%22%3A%22true%22%7D)%2Cthis.lastExecutionTime%3Dnull%2Cthis.blocking%3D!1%7DignoreEntities%3D%5B%22EntityItem%22%2C%22EntityXPOrb%22%5D%3BafterTick()%7Blet%20e%3DDate %2Cthis.activeDropdownListeners.hideDropdown%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22resize%22%2Cthis.activeDropdownListeners.hideDropdown%2C!0)%2Cthis.activeDropdownListeners%3Dnull)%2Cthis.activeDropdown%26%26(this.activeDropdown.classList.remove(%22open%22)%2Cthis.activeDropdown%3Dnull)%2Cthis.currentOptionsList%3Dnull%7DaddNumberInput(e)%7Blet%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.className%3D%22gui-setting-container%20setting-number%22%3Blet%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Br.className%3D%22gui-setting-label%22%2Cr.textContent%3De%3Blet%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22input%22)%3Bi.type%3D%22text%22%2Ci.className%3D%22gui-text-input%20number-input%22%2Ci.value%3Dthis.module.options%5Be%5D%2Ci.addEventListener(%22input%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3Di.value.trim()%3B!isNaN(a)%26%26a!%3D%3D%22%22%26%26(this.module.options%5Be%5D%3Da%2Cc.emit(%22setting.update%22%2C%7BmoduleName%3Athis.module.name%2Csetting%3Ae%2Cvalue%3Aa%7D))%7D)%2Ct.append(r%2Ci)%2Cthis.settingsContainer.appendChild(t)%2Cthis.components.push(t)%7DaddStringInput(e)%7Blet%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.className%3D%22gui-setting-container%20setting-string%22%3Blet%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Br.className%3D%22gui-setting-label%22%2Cr.textContent%3De%3Blet%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22input%22)%3Bi.type%3D%22text%22%2Ci.className%3D%22gui-text-input%20string-input%22%2Ci.value%3Dthis.module.options%5Be%5D%2Ci.addEventListener(%22input%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Bthis.module.options%5Be%5D%3Di.value%2Cc.emit(%22setting.update%22%2C%7BmoduleName%3Athis.module.name%2Csetting%3Ae%2Cvalue%3Ai.value%7D)%7D)%2Ct.append(r%2Ci)%2Cthis.settingsContainer.appendChild(t)%2Cthis.components.push(t)%7DaddCheckbox(e)%7Blet%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.className%3D%22gui-setting-container%20setting-boolean%22%3Blet%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Br.className%3D%22gui-setting-label%22%2Cr.textContent%3De%3Blet%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bi.className%3D% %7Bfor(let%20e%20of%20o)%7Blet%20t%3Dnew%20e%3Bthis.modules%5Bt.name%5D%3Dt%7D%7D%2CaddModule%3Afunction(o)%7Bthis.modules%5Bo.name%5D%3Do%7D%2ChandleKeyPress%3Afunction(o)%7Bfor(let%20e%20in%20this.modules)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.modules%5Be%5D%3Bt.waitingForBind%3F(t.keybind%3Do%2Ct.waitingForBind%3D!1)%3Ao%26%26t.keybind%3D%3Do%26%26t.toggle()%7D%7D%2Cinit()%7Bthis.addModules(U%2CR%2C_%2Cz%2CT%2CO%2CD%2CP%2CA%2CL%2CI%2CM%2Cw%2Ck%2CB%2CC%2Cv%2CE%2CS)%2Cc.on(%22render%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Bfor(let%20o%20in%20this.modules)this.modules%5Bo%5D.isEnabled%26%26this.modules%5Bo%5D.onRender()%7D)%2Cc.on(%22beforeTick%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Bfor(let%20o%20in%20this.modules)this.modules%5Bo%5D.isEnabled%26%26this.modules%5Bo%5D.beforeTick()%7D)%2Cc.on(%22afterTick%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Bfor(let%20o%20in%20this.modules)this.modules%5Bo%5D.isEnabled%26%26this.modules%5Bo%5D.afterTick()%7D)%2Cc.on(%22packet%22%2Co%3D%3E%7Bfor(let%20e%20in%20this.modules)this.modules%5Be%5D.isEnabled%26%26this.modules%5Be%5D.onPacket(o)%7D)%2Cc.on(%22keydown%22%2Cthis.handleKeyPress.bind(this))%2Cc.on(%22setting.update%22%2Co%3D%3E%7Bfor(let%20e%20in%20this.modules)(this.modules%5Be%5D.isEnabled%7C%7Co.moduleName%3D%3D%3De)%26%26this.modules%5Be%5D.onSettingUpdate(o.moduleName%2Co.setting%2Co.value)%7D)%2Cthis.modules.Arraylist.enable()%2Cthis.modules.Watermark.enable()%7D%7D%3Bvar%20j%3D%60%3Ahost%20%7B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--Ballcrack-accent-color%3A%20linear-gradient(90deg%2C%20rgb(64%2C%20190%2C%20255)%200%25%2C%20rgb(129%2C%20225%2C%20255)%20100%25)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--Ballcrack-accent-color%3A%20linear-gradient(90deg%2C%20rgb(64%2C%20190%2C%20255)%200%25%2C%20rgb(129%2C%20225%2C%20255)%20100%25)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--button-color%3A%20rgb(40%2C%2040%2C%2040%2C%200.9)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--hover-color%3A%20rgb(50%2C%2050%2C%2050%2C%200.9)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--panel-bg%3A%20rgb(18%2C%2018%2C%2018%2C%200.95)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--header-bg%3A%20rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200%2C%200.85)%3B%5Cr%0A%20%20%20%20--text-color%3A%2 %2Cr%3Dt.shift().toLowerCase()%2Ci%3Dthis.commands%5Br%5D%3Bi%3Fi.execute(t)%3An.game.chat.addChat(%7Btext%3A%22Unknown%20command.%20Type%20.help%20for%20a%20list%20of%20commands.%22%7D)%2Co.data.text%3D%22%22%7D%7D%7D%2Cinit()%7Bc.on(%22packet%22%2Cthis.onPacket.bind(this))%2Cthis.registerCommands(W%2CH)%7D%7D%3Bfunction%20Q(o)%7Blet%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22style%22)%3Be.textContent%3Do%2Cd.wrapper.appendChild(e)%7Dvar%20Z%3Dnew%20FontFace(%22Product%20Sans%22%2C%22url(https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.gstatic.com%2Fs%2Fproductsans%2Fv19%2FpxiDypQkot1TnFhsFMOfGShVF9eO.woff2)%22%2C%7Bstyle%3A%22normal%22%2Cweight%3A%22400%22%7D)%3BZ.load().then(o%3D%3Edocument.fonts.add(o))%3Bvar%20ee%3Dnew%20FontFace(%22Inter%22%2C%22url(https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.gstatic.com%2Fs%2Finter%2Fv18%2FUcCO3FwrK3iLTeHuS_fvQtMwCp50KnMa.woff2)%22%2C%7Bstyle%3A%22normal%22%2Cweight%3A%22300%22%7D)%3Bee.load().then(o%3D%3Edocument.fonts.add(o))%3BQ(j)%3Bfunction%20q()%7Bb.init()%2Cn.hookOnTick()%2Cg.init()%2CG.init()%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Ce%3D%3E%7Bc.emit(%22keydown%22%2Ce.code)%7D)%2CsetInterval(()%3D%3E%7Bc.emit(%22render%22)%7D%2C1e3%2F60)%2C!0%26%26(window.ballcrack%3D%7Bhooks%3An%2CshadowWrapper%3Ad%2CmoduleManager%3Ab%2CinteractionUtils%3AV%2CblockUtils%3Ah%2CpacketUtils%3Ag%2CcommandManager%3AG%7D)%7Ddocument.readyState%3D%3D%3D%22complete%22%7C%7Cdocument.readyState%3D%3D%3D%22interactive%22%3Fq()%3Adocument.addEventListener(%22DOMContentLoaded%22%2Cq)%3B%7D)()%3B%0A%7D)()
